title: tillandsia × mariae
intro: Tillandsia × mariae is a rare and exotic air plant species that is a hybrid of the Tillandsia mariae and Tillandsia butzii. This epiphyte is known for its unique ability to thrive in environments with minimal watering and light, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, wounds, and digestive problems. The air plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote respiratory health, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function.
